name: Creamy Horseradish Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup horseradish (prepared, white, drained, and squeezed dry)
1 teaspoon white vinegar or lemon juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the prepared horseradish with sugar, Dijon mustard, salt, and paprika until smooth.
2. Gently fold the whipped cream into the mixture.
3. Chill for 2 hours before serving. Prepare the sauce on the day you plan to use it, as whipped cream does not keep well. Chill the bowl and beaters to produce a lighter, fluffier cream.
